inputs.text: Ab toh bukhar bahut tez ho gaya hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar rahi hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, abdominal pain, and diarrhea after constipation is highly suggestive of Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, given the severity of symptoms and the presence of diarrhea after constipation

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but less likely, given the absence of typical malaria symptoms

inputs.text: Main bahut thak gayi hoon, bukhar abhi tak hai, pet mein bahut dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of high fever, abdominal pain, and signs of intestinal perforation confirm the diagnosis of Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, given the severity of symptoms and the presence of intestinal perforation signs

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, given the absence of typical malaria symptoms and the presence of intestinal perforation signs
